# vendor_host corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only. Each section pairs
# a vendor host (or labelled-key prefix) with a bare-shape token in the same
# window, which the vendor-host deep-scan heuristic flags. Tokens are crafted
# low-entropy so the base64 deep scanner does not also engage.

# === Azure Cognitive Services ===
# expect: Azure Cognitive Services Key (host-gated)
endpoint westus.cognitiveservices.azure.com path speech v1
0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Linode ===
# expect: Linode API Token (host-gated)
GET https://api.linode.com/v4/account profile
0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Neon ===
# expect: Neon Database Token (host-gated)
dashboard console.neon.tech project main
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123

# === Hetzner ===
# expect: Hetzner Cloud Token (host-gated)
base url api.hetzner.cloud v1 servers
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789

# === Cloudant ===
# expect: Cloudant Credential (host-gated)
service host acme.cloudant.com database orders
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789

# === Cloudflare R2 ===
# expect: Cloudflare R2 Access Key (host-gated)
bucket abc123.r2.cloudflarestorage.com region auto
0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567

# === Generic API Key header ===
# expect: Generic API Key Header
X-Api-Key: abcdef0123456789abcd

# === Authorization Bearer ===
# expect: Authorization Bearer Token
Authorization: Bearer abcdef0123456789abcdef01

# === Authorization Basic ===
# expect: Authorization Basic Credential
Authorization: Basic YWxhZGRpbjpvcGVuc2VzYW1l

# === Datadog ===
# expect: Datadog API Key (host-gated)
DD-API-KEY: 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === New Relic ===
# expect: New Relic License Key (host-gated)
X-License-Key: 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123abcd

# === Civo ===
# expect: Civo API Key (host-gated)
base url api.civo.com v2 instances
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123

# === Railway ===
# expect: Railway Token (host-gated)
graphql backboard.railway.app v2
12345678-1234-4123-8123-1234567890ab

# === Porter ===
# expect: Porter Token (host-gated)
dashboard.porter.run cluster prod
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123

# === Vultr ===
# expect: Vultr API Key (host-gated)
base url api.vultr.com v2 account
ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCD

# === OVH ===
# expect: OVH Application Secret (host-gated)
endpoint eu.api.ovh.com 1.0 me
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789

# === Postmark ===
# expect: Postmark Server Token (host-gated)
X-Postmark-Server-Token: 12345678-1234-4123-8123-1234567890ab

# === Scaleway ===
# expect: Scaleway Secret Key (host-gated)
base url api.scaleway.com instance v1
12345678-1234-4123-8123-1234567890ab

# === Maven Central ===
# expect: Maven Central Token (host-gated)
repository url https://central.sonatype.com api
ABCDEFabcdef0123ABCDEFabcdef0123ABCDEFabcdef0123

# === Hex.pm ===
# expect: Hex.pm API Key (host-gated)
publish target hex.pm registry release
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123

# === UpCloud ===
# expect: UpCloud API Credential (host-gated)
base url api.upcloud.com 1.3 account
YWxhZGRpbjpvcGVuc2VzYW1lYWxhZGRpbg==

# === Coolify ===
# expect: Coolify API Token (labeled)
coolify_api_token=abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123

# === Criteo ===
# expect: Criteo API Token (host-gated)
endpoint api.criteo.com 2024 marketing
ABCDEFabcdef0123ABCDEFabcdef0123ABCDEFabcdef0123

# === Xandr ===
# expect: Xandr Token (host-gated)
endpoint api.adnxs.com v3 auth
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123

# === Twilio (SID-anchored auth token) ===
# expect: Twilio Auth Token (paired with Account SID)
ACabcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789
0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Wiz ===
# expect: Wiz Service Account Token (host-gated)
endpoint auth.app.wiz.io oauth token
abcdef0123456789ABCDEF0123456789abcdef0123456789

# === Censys ===
# expect: Censys API Secret (host-gated)
base url search.censys.io api v2
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcd

# === Tatum ===
# expect: Tatum API Key (host-gated)
endpoint api.tatum.io v3 blockchain
12345678-1234-4123-8123-1234567890ab

# === Particle ===
# expect: Particle Access Token (host-gated)
base url api.particle.io v1 devices
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01
